name: Estimates
description: Estimate management endpoints for reading, updating, and deleting job estimates, plus line item linking/unlinking (CORE/SUB classification, VAT, and automatic totalling). Estimates are created by the job service — one per job.

request.description:
Fetch a single estimate by its ID. The estimate must belong to the authenticated user's company.

```bash
curl -X GET "{{base_url}}/api/v1/estimates/1" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer {{jwt_token}}"
```

response.name: Get Estimate by ID - Success
response.body:
{
    "id": 1,
    "jobId": 5,
    "companyId": 1,
    "notes": "Initial estimate for the job",
    "lineItems": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "companyId": 1,
            "productCode": "SVC-001",
            "productDescription": "Installation Service",
            "additionalDetails": "Ground floor installation",
            "unitPrice": 150.00,
            "coreOrSub": "CORE",
            "quantity": 2.0000,
            "vatRate": 0.2000,
            "netAmount": 300.00,
            "vatAmount": 60.00,
            "totalAmount": 360.00,
            "createdAt": "2026-03-05T10:00:00",
            "updatedAt": "2026-03-05T10:00:00"
        }
    ],
    "totalNet": 300.00,
    "totalVat": 60.00,
    "grandTotal": 360.00,
    "createdAt": "2026-03-05T10:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-05T10:00:00"
}

response.name: Get Estimate by ID - Not Found

request.description:
Fetch the estimate associated with a specific job. Useful when you have the job ID but not the estimate ID.

```bash
curl -X GET "{{base_url}}/api/v1/estimates/job/5" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer {{jwt_token}}"
```

request.description:
Update the notes on an existing estimate. All fields are optional — only provided fields will be updated.

**Optional fields:**
- `notes` (String): Updated free-text notes

```bash
curl -X PUT "{{base_url}}/api/v1/estimates/1" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer {{jwt_token}}" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{ "notes": "Updated notes after site survey" }'
```

request.description:
Permanently delete an estimate and all its line item associations. The line items themselves are NOT deleted — they remain in the system and can be linked to other estimates.

```bash
curl -X DELETE "{{base_url}}/api/v1/estimates/1" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer {{jwt_token}}"
```

Create a brand-new line item and immediately link it to this estimate in one operation. Returns the full updated estimate (201 Created) including recalculated totals.

**Required fields:**
- `productCode` (String): Short product or service code (e.g. `SVC-001`)
- `productDescription` (String): Human-readable description of the product or service
- `unitPrice` (BigDecimal): Price per unit, must be >= 0
- `coreOrSub` (String enum): Classification — `CORE` for core work, `SUB` for subcontracted work
- `quantity` (BigDecimal): Number of units, must be > 0
- `vatRate` (BigDecimal): VAT rate as a decimal (e.g. `0.20` for 20%), must be >= 0

**Optional fields:**
- `additionalDetails` (String): Free-text additional context

**Calculated fields (read-only in response):**
- `netAmount` = `unitPrice` * `quantity`
- `vatAmount` = `netAmount` * `vatRate`
- `totalAmount` = `netAmount` + `vatAmount`

```bash
curl -X POST "{{base_url}}/api/v1/estimates/1/line-items" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer {{jwt_token}}" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "productCode": "SVC-001",
    "productDescription": "Installation Service",
    "additionalDetails": "Ground floor installation, requires 2 engineers",
    "unitPrice": 150.00,
    "coreOrSub": "CORE",
    "quantity": 2.0,
    "vatRate": 0.20
  }'
```

response.name: Create and Link Line Item - Success
response.body:
{
    "id": 1,
    "jobId": 5,
    "companyId": 1,
    "notes": "Initial estimate for the job",

response.name: Create and Link Line Item - Estimate Not Found

request.description:
Attach an already-existing line item (by its ID) to this estimate. No request body is required — the link is established purely by the path parameters. Returns the full updated estimate (200 OK) with recalculated totals.

Use this when a line item was created via `POST /api/v1/line-items` and you now want to associate it with an estimate.

```bash
curl -X PUT "{{base_url}}/api/v1/estimates/1/line-items/1" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer {{jwt_token}}"
```

response.name: Link Existing Line Item - Success
response.body:
{
    "id": 1,
    "jobId": 5,
    "companyId": 1,
    "notes": "Initial estimate for the job",
    "lineItems": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "companyId": 1,
            "productCode": "SVC-001",
            "productDescription": "Installation Service",
            "additionalDetails": "Ground floor installation",
            "unitPrice": 150.00,
            "coreOrSub": "CORE",
            "quantity": 2.0000,
            "vatRate": 0.2000,
            "netAmount": 300.00,
            "vatAmount": 60.00,
            "totalAmount": 360.00,
            "createdAt": "2026-03-05T10:00:00",
            "updatedAt": "2026-03-05T10:00:00"
        }
    ],
    "totalNet": 300.00,
    "totalVat": 60.00,
    "grandTotal": 360.00,
    "createdAt": "2026-03-05T10:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-05T10:15:00"
}

response.name: Link Existing Line Item - Line Item Not Found

request.description:
Remove the association between a line item and this estimate. The line item itself is NOT deleted — it remains in the system and can be linked to other estimates. Returns the full updated estimate (200 OK) with recalculated totals.

```bash
curl -X DELETE "{{base_url}}/api/v1/estimates/1/line-items/1" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer {{jwt_token}}"
```

response.name: Unlink Line Item - Line Item Not Found
